title.zh: 头痛怎么办？试试这4个穴位

description.zh: 介绍4个有效缓解头痛的穴位及其按摩方法，帮助您快速缓解头痛不适
description.en: Four effective acupoints for headache relief and massage techniques

zh.text: 头痛是现代人常见的困扰，中医认为头痛多与气血运行不畅、肝阳上亢、风寒侵袭等因素有关。通过穴位按摩，可以有效缓解头痛症状。
穴位1：太阳穴
位置：眉梢与外眼角之间，向后约1寸凹陷处。
功效：疏风止痛，清头明目。适用于偏头痛、眼疲劳引起的头痛。
按摩方法：用拇指或食指指腹按压，力度适中，顺时针揉按1-2分钟。
穴位2：风池穴
位置：后颈部，枕骨下方，两侧肌肉凹陷处。
功效：疏风解表，清头止痛。适用于风寒头痛、颈源性头痛。
按摩方法：用双手拇指按压，向上推揉，每次2-3分钟。
穴位3：百会穴
位置：头顶正中，两耳尖连线的中点处。
功效：升阳举陷，清头目。适用于头晕头痛、失眠健忘。
按摩方法：用中指或拇指按压，轻轻揉按，每次1-2分钟。
穴位4：合谷穴
位置：手背，第一、二掌骨之间，约第二掌骨中点处。
功效：疏风解表，镇痛安神。适用于各种头痛，尤其是前头痛。
按摩方法：用拇指按压，力度以有酸胀感为宜，每次3-5分钟。
头痛类型与选穴

items: 全头痛：可综合使用多个穴位

zh.text: 按摩注意事项

items: 按摩时保持放松，呼吸自然

zh.text: 温馨提示：穴位按摩适用于日常保健和轻度头痛缓解。如头痛频繁、剧烈或伴有其他症状，应及时就医检查，找出头痛的根本原因。

en.text: Headache is a common modern problem. TCM believes headaches relate to poor Qi-Blood circulation, excessive liver Yang, or wind-cold invasion. Acupoint massage can effectively relieve headache symptoms.
Point 1: Taiyang (Extra Point)
Location: Between eyebrow tail and outer eye corner, about 1 cun backward in depression.
Benefits: Release wind, relieve pain, clear head and eyes. For migraine, eye strain headache.
Massage: Press with thumb or index finger, moderate pressure, circular rub 1-2 minutes.
Point 2: Fengchi (GB20)
Location: Back of neck, below occipital bone, depression on both sides of muscles.
Benefits: Release wind, clear exterior, clear head and relieve pain. For wind-cold headache, cervical headache.
Massage: Press with both thumbs, push upward, 2-3 minutes each time.
Point 3: Baihui (GV20)
Location: Top of head center, midpoint of line connecting ear tips.
Benefits: Raise Yang, clear head and eyes. For dizziness, headache, insomnia, forgetfulness.
Massage: Press with middle finger or thumb, gentle rub, 1-2 minutes each time.
Point 4: Hegu (LI4)
Location: Hand back, between first and second metacarpal bones, about midpoint of second metacarpal.
Benefits: Release wind, clear exterior, relieve pain, calm spirit. For various headaches, especially frontal headache.
Massage: Press with thumb, moderate pressure until soreness, 3-5 minutes each time.
Headache Types and Point Selection

items: Whole head pain: Combine multiple points

en.text: Massage Notes

items: Stay relaxed during massage, breathe naturally
Combine with hot compress for better effect

en.text: Note: Acupoint massage is for daily health maintenance and mild headache relief. For frequent, severe headaches or those with other symptoms, seek medical examination to identify root causes.
